name: photography-ai
description: Photography Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: analyze_exif
tools.description: Analyze EXIF metadata from an image file (JPEG).

tools.name: map_photo_locations
tools.description: Map and cluster photo locations from GPS coordinates.

tools.name: find_duplicates
tools.description: Find duplicate photos using file hash or metadata comparison.

tools.name: extract_color_palette
tools.description: Extract and analyze a color palette from image color data.

tools.name: edit_metadata
tools.description: Plan metadata edits for a photo file (generates edit commands).
